name: Healthy Hamburger
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine yogurt, cheese and cumin; blend with fork until cheese is finely crumbled. Cover and chill at least 1 hour.
2. Combine beef and the remaining 4 ingredients, mixing well. Shape into 4 patties.
3. Cook in non-stick skillet or grill 3 inches from heat for 6-7 minutes on each side or until meat and juices are no longer pink. Drain on paper towels.
4. Place lettuce leaf, 5 slices of cucumber and beef patty on each roll half. Top with 2 tablespoons yogurt mixture and remaining half roll.
5. Serves 4.
